Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us understand how you interact with our site and improve its performance and functionality. #### Types of Cookies Used 1. Essential Cookies: These are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms. 2. Performance Cookies: These cookies allow us to count visits
